data.revised_prompt: cinematic realistic watercolor book illustration, professional visual for a Chinese 30-minute book-summary video, quiet Kamakura and Izu Oshima atmosphere, Japanese seaside town, camellia flowers, paper letters, fountain pens, warm natural film lighting, detailed environment, emotional healing tone, soft but rich colors, storybook realism, consistent art direction across a 24-image sequence, 16:9, no readable text, no logo, no watermark. Main protagonist: one East Asian woman in her early 30s, shoulder-length black hair, soft cream cardigan, calm tired eyes. Mother: East Asian woman in her late 50s with short grey hair and muted green cardigan, clearly older than the protagonist. Daughter: teenage East Asian girl with school uniform and ponytail, clearly much younger. When a scene includes multiple people, make them different ages, different clothes, different hairstyles, different faces. Scene 15/24, story beat: Seaside walk alone. Composition: wide seaside path after rain, Kamakura coastline and wet pavement, the protagonist walks alone holding an envelope, camellia bushes beside the path, quiet room to breathe. People rule: single protagonist only. Keep this image narratively connected to the nearby subtitle meaning, but do not draw readable words: 想起曾经应该道歉却没有道歉的人想起爱过却错过的人想起已经离开的亲人想起孩子小时候的样子想起某个再也回不去的季节我们可能不会真的拿起笔但故事提醒我们那些心意并没有完全消失它们只是沉到更深的地方等待某个安静的时刻被温柔地看见小川糸的文字里食物和季节总是承担着疗愈的力量樱花、紫阳花、金木樨、山茶、明日叶、
